name: Orange French Toast
recipeIngredient: Italian bread, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, orange juice, orange liqueur, 2 tablespoons confectioners sugar, and vanilla.
2. Place bread slices in one layer in a large roasting or baking pan.
3. Pour egg mixture over slices. Turn to soak.
4. Place in refrigerator for at least 2 hours, turning bread slices occasionally.
5. On a plate, combine confectioners sugar and brown sugar.
6. Preheat electric skillet to 375 degrees.
7. Melt butter and set aside.
8. Remove bread slices from egg mixture.
9. Place in skillet.
10. Cook French Toast about 3 to 5 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Add more butter to skillet, if necessary.
11. Toss slices in sugar mixture and serve immediately.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
